case_title: MEDNICK STEVEN VS WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO OVERSEEER OF 1544 CALIF WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDNICK STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MEDNICK STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
